changelog.change: First release with Start, End, and Reset options.
Settings UI refresh, reset master toggle, paused/ended restart detection. Multi-Contract and Load Removal option (pointer-based).
Pixel-based load removal (first load and contract-board load), updated Options tab, all resets use Warn on Reset if Gold when enabled.

Separated Multi-Contract and Load Time Removal options, improved load-removal pixel warnings and Known Issues text, and fixed multi-contract behavior so it works even when Load Time Removal is disabled.
Clarified README and behavior notes for Multi-Contract and Load Time Removal, documenting how splits and resets behave across chained contracts.
Fixed the Load Remover, removed pixel and color detection and replaced with reliable memory detection.
